case_title: JOSEPH CRUZ et al VS. AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,477.00 FILED BY CRUZ, JOSEPH BORROMEO, CARMELITA AS TO DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC. IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., RETURNED "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT NOT FOUND-BUSINESS CLOSED". FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JOSEPH BORROMEO, CARMELITA AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-19-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OF CO-DEFENDANT CRISOSTOMO IBARRA. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JOSEPH BORROMEO, CARMELITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC. IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
